flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Swarthmore College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.1k → $65.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Swarthmore College rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.2k → $37.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Swarthmore College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (87.0% → 75.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Swarthmore College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
